steps.title: Recall the mean formula
steps.content: The mean is found by adding all the values and dividing by how many values there are. Count the data set: 6, 10, 13, 2, 15, 22, 10, 4, 4, 4 — there are 10 values.

steps.title: Add all heights and divide
steps.content:
Sum all the values:
$$6 + 10 + 13 + 2 + 15 + 22 + 10 + 4 + 4 + 4 = 90$$
Divide the sum by the count:
$$\frac{90}{10} = 9$$
The mean height of the plants is 9 centimeters.
